cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Palwinder Singh, this is Agent Sharma from Lufthansa Miles. Sir, we have an important notification regarding your loyalty program.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, hello. What's this about, ji?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 15s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from an airline's loyalty program ([AIRLINE_COMPANY] Miles) calls a frequent flyer to inform them that they have accumulated enough points for a free flight upgrade on their next trip and explains how to claim it through the official app.
